title: Anthony Gelling
description: Cook Islands international rugby league footballer
extract:
Anthony Gelling (born 18 October 1990) is a Cook Islands international rugby league footballer who plays as a centre, winger and second-row forward.
He has previously played for the Wigan Warriors in the Super League, the New Zealand Warriors in the National Rugby League, the Widnes Vikings in the Championship, and the Warrington Wolves and the Leigh Centurions in the Super League.
